name: Lead Qualifier
description: Autonomous B2B agent-to-agent lead qualification. Pitches, qualifies prospects, and books meetings — only pings you when a warm lead is confirmed.

pitch.description: Your sales pitch / ICP description shown to the qualification LLM.

anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key. Falls back to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.

calApiKey.description: Cal.com API key for booking meetings.

calEventTypeId.description: Cal.com event type ID or slug (e.g. '30min').

hubspotToken.description: HubSpot private app token for CRM write-back.

notifyChannel.description: Channel to send human notifications on warm leads (slack, telegram, discord, msteams).

notifyTarget.description: Recipient ID for human notifications (Slack user ID, Telegram chat ID, etc.).

a2aSignatures.description: Extra phrases to detect agent-to-agent conversations.

pitch.label: Sales Pitch / ICP
pitch.help: Describe your product and ideal customer. The qualification agent uses this as its knowledge base.

notifyChannel.label: Notify Channel
notifyChannel.help: Where you get pinged when a meeting is booked (slack, telegram, discord, msteams)

notifyTarget.label: Notify Target ID
notifyTarget.help: Your user/channel ID on the notify channel

maxTurns.label: Max Turns
maxTurns.help: How many back-and-forth messages before auto-escalating to you (default: 8)
